groupings.title: Code quality
groupings.description: Ruff linting, strict typing, and pre-commit hooks that catch problems before they ever reach CI.

groupings.title: Test and gate
groupings.description: pytest infrastructure with coverage gates and GitHub Actions matrices that make a green check mean something.

groupings.title: Package and ship
groupings.description: Modern pyproject packaging, uv workflows, and OIDC trusted publishing - from src layout to PyPI without stored tokens.

groupings.title: Harden
groupings.description: Supply-chain defenses and agentic guardrails that keep dependencies and AI sessions inside the rails.
